channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DNA tests to confirm identity of human remains found in crocodile from Komati River
item.description: Police in Mpumalanga are set to conduct DNA tests to establish whether human remains discovered inside a crocodile in the Komati River belong to a businessman from Komatipoort who went missing more th...

item.title: SAIIA launches Africa Youth Portal to support young researchers and future policy leaders
item.description: The South African Institute of International Affairs (SAIIA) has launched the Africa Youth Portal, a new platform aimed at strengthening the role of young African researchers in shaping public policy ...

item.title: US warns of possible renewed strikes as Iran proposes phased deal amid ongoing tensions
item.description: Sinabi ni US President Donald Trump na posible muling magsagawa ng military strikes laban sa Iran kung hindi ito susunod o kung gagawa ng hakbang na itinuturing na banta. Bagamat may umiiral na tigil-...

item.title: Toronto Roads Closed This Weekend: Key Details for Drivers
item.description: Toronto is experiencing a series of major road closures over the weekend that will affect traffic flow across several parts of the city. Local authorities have issued notices for residents and commute...

item.title: JAMB Says Viral 394 UTME Result Slip Is Fake
item.description: The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) has dismissed a result slip circulating online that claims a candidate scored 394 in the 2026 Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination (UTME). The...

item.title: Spirit Airlines ceases operations following failed financial rescue
item.description: Spirit Airlines, a U.S.-based low-cost airline known for its extensive a la carte fees, announced it would immediately cease all operations after attempts to secure financial assistance failed. The ai...

item.title: Opec+ Approves Modest Oil Output Increase Amid Hormuz Strait Disruption
item.description: Opec+ has approved a modest increase in oil output for June, marking the third consecutive monthly hike since the closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the US-Israeli war on Iran. The decision involv...

item.title: ARIA directs over £50 million in UK public funds to American technology firms and venture capital groups
item.description: Britain’s Advanced Research and Invention Agency (ARIA), an initiative championed by Dominic Cummings to support high-risk scientific projects, has allocated more than £50 million of taxpayer money to...

item.title: Carlton skipper Patrick Cripps fined but avoids suspension for chicken-wing tackle
item.description: Carlton captain Patrick Cripps has been fined $1000 but avoided a suspension for his chicken-wing tackle on St Kilda's Hugo Garcia during Carlton's 39-point loss at Marvel Stadium. Cripps accepted an ...

item.title: House Committee to Transmit VP Sara Duterte’s Impeachment Report to Full House
item.description: The House Committee on Justice is set to formally adopt its committee report finding probable cause to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte on Monday, May 4. The adoption will include the corresponding...

item.title: SIS Plans ₹20,000 Crore Revenue in FY27, Focuses on Market Expansion and Technology-Driven Solutions
item.description: SIS Ltd., an Indian multinational operating in security solutions, facility management, and cash logistics, aims to achieve ₹20,000 crore in revenue for FY27, following a record revenue of approximate...

item.title: Green leader Zack Polanski urges restraint on protest language while opposing bans on pro-Palestine marches
item.description: Green party leader Zack Polanski has said he would discourage pro-Palestine protesters from using the phrase “globalise the intifada”, while strongly opposing calls to ban the chant or restrict demons...

item.title: Kacey Dela Rosa Set to Play Final Year with Ateneo Lady Eagles in UAAP
item.description: In a much-awaited development for UAAP fans, standout player Kacey Dela Rosa has confirmed her return to the Ateneo Lady Eagles for her final playing year in the collegiate basketball league. The anno...

item.title: SAPS Warns of Scam Offering Fake Police Training Positions to 5,500 Jobseekers
item.description: A widespread scam has surfaced on social media, claiming that the South African Police Service (SAPS) is offering training to 5,500 police trainees. The scam falsely promotes positions with low requir...

item.title: The Cormack Foundation’s Influence on the Victorian Liberal Party
item.description: The Victorian Liberal Party, under leader Jess Wilson, recently secured a win in the Nepean by-election on the Mornington Peninsula, fending off challenges from One Nation and independents. However, i...

item.title: Tanzania and Rwanda strengthen cooperation in trade, infrastructure, and energy
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzania and Rwanda have reinforced their strong relationship and promised to deepen cooperation in trade, investment, and infrastructure after bilateral talks between President Samia ...

item.title: Caloocan Rep. Edgar Erice Considers Supreme Court Petition to Enforce Anti-Political Dynasty Law
item.description: Caloocan Representative Edgar Erice announced that he is thinking of bringing a petition to the Supreme Court to push for the implementation of an Anti-Political Dynasty Law. He expressed doubts that ...

item.title: Sky Jazul leads Ateneo to U16 3x3 Championship Repeat
item.description: Sky Jazul of Ateneo University made a huge impact in the UAAP U16 3x3 Basketball Finals, delivering a statement performance that helped the Blue Eagles claim their second consecutive championship in t...

item.title: Hyderabad Kingsmen and Peshawar Zalmi ready for PSL 11 final at Lahore’s Gaddafi Stadium
item.description: Today, Lahore’s Gaddafi Stadium will witness the grand finale of the 11th season of HBL Pakistan Super League (PSL) as Hyderabad Kingsmen take on Peshawar Zalmi. The toss for the final match will happ...

item.title: Fact Check: Cape Town Remains Part of South Africa, Not a US Province
item.description: A video circulating online claims that Cape Town has become an official province of the United States after South Africa's Democratic Alliance (DA) received a loan from the 'Bezos Foundation'. This cl...
